heading.title: Frequently Asked Questions About Writing a Book with AI
heading.description: How does the AI book creator work, what's the output quality, and is it KDP-compatible? The most critical questions about the book writing process.

quality.question: Can an AI-written book really be high quality?
quality.answer: AI creates the draft — you control the quality. Edit every chapter, regenerate what you don't like. {kdpLiveBooksClaim} of our books are live with a {kdpGuaranteeClaim} guarantee.

duration.question: How long does it take to write a book with AI?
duration.answer: Enter your topic and get a publish-ready EPUB and PDF in 30–90 minutes. Most books are completed in a single session. According to user surveys, 92% of authors publish within 7 days compared to 3-6 months with traditional writing methods.

kdp.question: Can I upload the EPUB and PDF outputs directly to KDP?
kdp.answer: Yes. You get KDP-compatible EPUB and PDF outputs. We recommend a final review with your own checklist before uploading.

creditCard.question: Do I need a credit card to start?
creditCard.answer: No. Start with a free preview — explore your book's draft, cover, and outline without entering any payment information. Upgrade only when you're satisfied with the result.

formats.question: What output formats are available?
formats.answer: You receive EPUB (for Kindle and all e-readers), PDF (for print-on-demand), and a shareable HTML preview. All outputs are editable and KDP-ready.

showcase.title: AI-Generated Real Book Examples

faq.title: Questions on your mind
faq.description: Everything you need to know before choosing a plan.

0.a: If you're testing your first book, start with the Single Book plan ($4) — zero risk, no subscription. If you plan to produce a few books per month, Starter ($19/mo, 10 books) is far more economical. If you want to publish regularly, Creator ($39/mo, 30 books) is the sweet spot — including the research hub and KDP analytics.

1.a: Yes. You can access the wizard without signing up. Viewing the outline, cover preview, and first chapters requires no payment. You only pay for the full book + export.

2.q: Can I upload directly to KDP?
2.a: Yes. EPUB and PDF outputs are produced to meet Amazon KDP upload requirements. The production workflow is designed around KDP-focused logic, and the delivery package is prepared with a KDP-compliance focus.

3.q: Can I write in one language and produce a book in another?
3.a: Yes. The interface stays in your preferred language, while the book content is produced in English or any other language you choose. English is KDP's largest market — you can turn that to your advantage.

4.a: Yes. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime. Manage everything with one click from the billing area — no approval needed.

5.q: Do unused book credits carry over?
5.a: No, monthly credits do not roll over to the next month. That's why you should choose the plan you need — there's no reason to get a bigger plan than necessary.

directAnswer.question: How does AI book generation work?
directAnswer.answer: Book Generator transforms your expertise into publication-ready books in 3 steps. First, answer 5 guided questions about your topic and audience. The AI generates a complete chapter outline for your approval. Once approved, it writes each chapter with consistent style and tone, then produces professional EPUB and PDF files ready for Amazon KDP publishing.

0.title: Enter your topic and target reader
0.text: Share a brief summary, your target reader, and the outcome you want to convey. No long forms — you start with guided questions.
0.output: Clear book direction, title angle, and starting framework

1.title: Review and approve the outline
1.text: The system suggests a title, chapter flow, and book structure. You can edit, refine, and approve before moving to production.
1.output: Visible chapter plan and a more controlled production workflow

2.title: Preview your book and get your outputs
2.text: See the first result, and when you like it, convert your book to full output. EPUB and PDF files are prepared in a single workflow.
2.output: Preview, editable content, and EPUB/PDF outputs

metadata.title: About Book Generator | Our AI Book Production Approach
metadata.description: Learn why Book Generator works with a simple interface, what principles guide our AI book production, and how we help first-time authors move faster.

directAnswer1.question: What is Book Generator?
directAnswer1.answer: Book Generator is an AI-powered publishing studio that transforms your expertise into KDP-ready books in 30-90 minutes. Unlike general AI tools, it provides specialized book structure, consistent chapter generation, professional cover design, and EPUB/PDF outputs in a single workflow. Users include consultants, educators, and content creators worldwide with 92% publishing within 7 days.

3.label: an approach that simplifies the publishing process

directAnswer2.question: What is Book Generator?
directAnswer2.answer: Book Generator is an AI-powered publishing platform that transforms your expertise into publication-ready books in 5 questions. It generates complete manuscripts, professional covers, and KDP-compliant EPUB/PDF output, handling research, outlining, writing, and formatting automatically. Model cost is included in the plan price and KDP-focused production workflow with KDP-compliance focus.

about.title: This product was designed for people who want to publish their book but don't want to drown in complex tools.
about.description: Our goal isn't to show more panels — it's to help more people actually finish their books. That's why we built a simple surface with a powerful production system behind it.
about.additionalText: For us, the real competitor isn't another AI tool — it's procrastination, blank page fear, and scattered workflows. We made product decisions specifically to reduce these psychological barriers.

principles.title: What principles did we build the product on?
principles.description: Both the marketing page and the in-app experience are based on the same decision: even a first-time user should be able to move forward without wondering where to click.

0.title: Fewer words
0.description: Short, clear steps that lead the user to the result — instead of long instructions and technical jargon.

1.title: Single path
1.description: For first-time users, the visible flow follows a simple create, write, publish logic.

2.title: Editable content
2.description: Every generated chapter can be revisited, expanded, and improved.

3.title: Publishing-focused
3.description: The goal isn't just writing — it's producing real output with EPUB, PDF, and delivery folders.

4.title: Confidence-building quality
4.description: Research, review, and correction layers work behind the scenes without overwhelming the first-time user.

5.title: AI but simple
5.description: Artificial intelligence doesn't create visible chaos; it simply provides speed and clarity where needed.

approach.title: It looks simple because the power is collected behind the scenes.
approach.description: Research, chapter planning, cover, chapter generation, and output are all organized around the same book. This gives both a professional and understandable product feel.

0.title: Simple on the surface because complexity is handled behind the scenes
0.description: For someone producing a book for the first time, the biggest problem is too many options. So instead of making advanced tasks visible one by one, we built a backbone that manages the flow.

1.title: We reduce decision fatigue instead of adding buttons
1.description: We don't want users to think about what to do first — we want them to just do it.

2.title: The first goal is always real output
2.description: That's why we placed output and book information flows at the center of the product.

3.title: Research and review tools can stay hidden
3.description: They open when needed; on the first screen, they don't overwhelm the user.

4.title: The goal isn't to show more features — it's to help more books get finished
4.description: That's why we treated the product not as a showcase panel, but as a result-oriented publishing system.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: To enable anyone with knowledge, expertise, or experience to turn it into a book without getting stuck on technical barriers.

approach.title: Approach
approach.description: First, a confidence-building message, then clear onboarding, then a book production flow that actually works. Model cost is included in the plan price and if the publishing target is KDP, the delivery package is prepared with KDP-compliance focus.

missionApproach.contact: Have questions or suggestions? Get in touch with us →

cta.title: This product exists for publishing books, not for showing off.
cta.description: So all design decisions serve one purpose: making it easier for the user to finish their first book. See the preview first, then move on to the full book.

items.2: Powerful production system behind the scenes

directAnswer.question: How can I contact Book Generator support?
directAnswer.answer: Book Generator provides three support channels: general support via email with same-day response time, billing support for payment and subscription questions, and technical help for book production issues. For fastest resolution, include your book slug, preview link, or screenshot. Average response time is 2 hours during business hours.

0.a: It takes your idea, generates an outline, produces chapters, and converts your book into publishable output files.

1.q: Can I generate content in English?
1.a: Yes. The interface stays in Turkish, but book content can be produced in English or any other language you choose.

2.q: Can a first-time user understand this?
2.a: Yes. The main workflow consists of a 5-question wizard and 3 basic steps: idea, outline, publish.

3.q: Is the preview really free? Do I need card details?
3.a: Yes, completely free. You can complete the wizard, see your cover and chapter plan without registration or card details. The first 20% content preview is also included. Payment is only required when you want the full book and output files.

4.q: Is AI-generated content really usable quality?
4.a: The output is a structured outline — not like a professional editor, but a ready-to-edit skeleton instead of starting from a blank page. You can modify, regenerate, or replace any chapter with your own text. KDP-focused production workflow and our books are prepared with KDP-compliance focus.

5.q: Who is this product NOT suitable for?
5.a: It is not designed for novel or fiction writers, those seeking academic formatting (footnotes, bibliography), or technical documentation needs. It's the right tool for guides, expertise books, info products, or KDP non-fiction.

0.q: How do I create a book?
0.a: Enter brief information such as topic, target reader, tone, and language. The system builds an outline and chapter flow based on that.

1.q: Do I have to generate chapters before approving the outline?
1.a: No. It is recommended to decide on the outline first, then proceed to chapter generation.

2.q: Can I edit the book later?
2.a: Yes. Chapter contents and book metadata can be updated in the workspace.

3.q: Can I generate just a single piece like an introduction or summary?
3.a: The main workflow is focused on full book production. In advanced workflows, you can also work on specific chapters.

4.q: Can I write in Turkish and produce an English book?
4.a: Yes. You can fill out the wizard entirely in Turkish; the system produces content in your chosen language — including English. No translation tool needed.

5.q: How many chapters are generated? Can I control the length?
5.a: You approve the number of chapters and their titles during the outline stage; the system typically suggests a 7–12 chapter outline. You can add, remove, or reorder chapters.

0.a: Yes. Local cover generation, manual upload, and AI-assisted cover options are available in supported workflows.

1.q: Are back cover and additional images supported?
1.a: Yes. Front and back cover files can be managed in the publishing and asset workflows within the workspace.

2.a: If you want, an automatic workflow is used; or you can proceed entirely with your own uploaded images.

0.a: Depending on your plan and selection, you receive EPUB, PDF, HTML, Markdown, and additional e-book formats where applicable.

1.a: It is recommended to get EPUB first. After checking the structure, you can move on to PDF and other formats.

2.a: Each book is stored in its own folder with timestamped output folders.

3.q: Can I upload the EPUB file directly to Amazon KDP?
3.a: Yes. The generated EPUB is compatible with Amazon KDP's standard upload workflow. KDP-focused production workflow and our books are prepared with KDP-compliance focus.

0.a: Since you provide the topic, direction, edits, and final approval, control of the resulting book belongs to the user.

1.q: Can I publish on KDP or other platforms?
1.a: Yes. The product produces digital outputs; the publishing decision and compliance with platform rules are the user's responsibility.

3.q: What does the $4 one-time payment include?

directAnswer1.question: Who is Book Generator for?
directAnswer1.answer: Book Generator serves six primary user segments: individual authors, consultants and coaches, instructors, KDP publishers, content creators, and organizations. 92% publish within 7 days.

directAnswer2.question: Who should use Book Generator?
directAnswer2.answer: Book Generator is ideal for anyone with expertise to share: first-time authors overcoming writer's block, consultants and coaches building authority, instructors transforming course content into books, KDP publishers scaling production.

metadata.title: Comparison | Book Creator and Alternatives
metadata.description: Compare Book Creator against manual writing, general AI assistants, and competing tools. Find out why a specialized book production tool is essential.

hero.title: You can start with ChatGPT.
hero.titleHighlight: But it may not be enough to finish.
hero.description: The problem isn't model quality — it's rewriting prompts for every chapter, maintaining a consistent tone, solving the cover separately, and completing the output separately.

directAnswer.question: How does Book Generator compare to ChatGPT or manual writing?
directAnswer.answer: Book Generator isn't a replacement for ChatGPT—it's a specialized book production system. While ChatGPT requires prompt engineering for each chapter, Book Generator provides topic-to-book workflow, consistent chapter generation, KDP-compliant EPUB/PDF output, and cover design in a single pipeline.

hiddenCost.label: The hidden cost of the manual approach
hiddenCost.text: A 10–30 hour workflow can't be managed in a single tool: research in one place, outline in another, cover separately, output separately. This fragmentation is the most common reason books remain unfinished.

featureTable.title: What can it do, and what can't it?
featureTable.description: Features purpose-built for book production — things general AI tools lack.

0.note: Other tools accept generic prompts; they don't understand book structure.

2.note: Long-form content suffers from context drift.

7.feature: No separate API costs for users
7.note: In Book Creator, model costs are included in the plan; some general tools charge separately.

9.note: General AI tools can produce Turkish content, but structure may break.

12.note: Token-based tools mean longer books = higher costs.

cons.1: You need to write new prompts for every chapter
cons.4: High token costs for long books

cons.3: Creating an outline is a project in itself

directAnswer.question: What book examples can I see?
directAnswer.answer: Explore 50+ real AI-generated books with visible chapter plans, first chapter previews, professional cover designs, and downloadable EPUB/PDF outputs.

intro.title: This page is not just a showcase — it's a decision-making tool
intro.description: A first-time visitor doesn't just look at covers here. Every example exists to help you quickly understand the real level of structure, content, and delivery format.

0.title: Structural quality
0.text: Is the chapter plan actually readable? Does the topic fit a logical backbone?

1.title: Content level
1.text: Thanks to first chapter previews, you see not just covers but also a real sense of the content.

2.title: Cover and positioning
2.text: Does the cover, title, and category alignment give you a sense of publishability? That's what you test.

3.title: Delivery format
3.text: Where available, you can see whether HTML, PDF, and EPUB outputs are truly ready.

instructions.0: First, use category, language, and search filters to find examples close to your topic.
instructions.1: Use quick look to explore the table of contents, first chapter, and output tabs.
instructions.2: Open the full page of any example that catches your eye for a deeper look.
instructions.3: Then start your own book with the same workflow using your topic.

0.question: Are these examples real, or just demo designs?
0.answer: The examples on this page come from the real production workflow — topic summary, outline, chapter generation, cover, and output.

1.question: What can I examine in each example?
1.answer: You can explore the cover, category, language, chapter count, summary, quick-look preview, text sample from the first chapter, and — where available — HTML/PDF/EPUB outputs.

2.question: Will my results be exactly the same as these examples?
2.answer: No, they won't be identical. But this page shows you the quality level, structural logic, and delivery format you can expect.

3.question: Can I start a book similar to an example I like?
3.answer: Yes. From any example, you can jump into the same starting workflow and begin a similar production process with your own topic.

nextStep.heading: If the examples look good enough, try your own topic now.
